aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured conversational content and authority signals. While the website has basic information, it doesn't fully cater to AI's preference for detailed, structured data and FAQ-style content.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC installation and maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
No active management of Q&A section to address potential customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC installation, repair, and maintenance in Sacramento.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, NATE-certified technicians, and detailed service expertise to position as the go-to HVAC authority in Sacramento.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the way customers ask questions today.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI to cite them in response to user queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make their business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the new search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Sacramento
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how to implement structured data and conversational content to capture AI-driven leads.
